arguments.command:
# Try Microsoft symbol server - ELF buildid convention
BUILDID="4ca7e2f19b3d605847a1c8e3f5b7d9a2c4e6f801"

# Try several URL patterns for Microsoft's symbol server
echo "=== Trying symweb/msdl patterns ==="

# Pattern 1: debuginfod-style
curl -sSL -o /dev/null -w "debuginfod pattern: %{http_code}\n" \
  "https://msdl.microsoft.com/download/symbols/buildid/${BUILDID}/debuginfo" 2>&1 || true

# Pattern 2: ELF buildid key
curl -sSL -o /dev/null -w "elf-buildid pattern: %{http_code}\n" \
  "https://msdl.microsoft.com/download/symbols/libcoreclr.so/elf-buildid-${BUILDID}/libcoreclr.so" 2>&1 || true

# Pattern 3: debuginfod.net
curl -sSL -o /dev/null -w "debuginfod.net: %{http_code}\n" \
  "https://debuginfod.elfutils.org/buildid/${BUILDID}/debuginfo" 2>&1 || true

# Pattern 4: Try Microsoft's NuGet symbol server
curl -sSL -o /dev/null -w "nuget symbols: %{http_code}\n" \
  "https://symbols.nuget.org/download/symbols/libcoreclr.so/elf-buildid-${BUILDID}/libcoreclr.so" 2>&1 || true

# Pattern 5: dotnet symbol server with sym suffix
curl -sSL -o /dev/null -w "elf-buildid-sym pattern: %{http_code}\n" \
  "https://msdl.microsoft.com/download/symbols/_.debug/elf-buildid-sym-${BUILDID}/_.debug" 2>&1 || true

  "https://symbols.nuget.org/download/symbols/libcoreclr.so/elf-buildid-${BUILDID}/libcoreclr.so" 2>&1 || true

# Pattern 5: dotnet symbol server with sym suffix

  "https://msdl.microsoft.com/download/symbols/_.debug/elf-buildid-sym-${BUILDID}/_.debug" 2>&1 || true
